headline: LIMA 2025 Secures RM18.5 Billion in Defence Orders
context: LIMA 2025 recorded RM18.5 billion in defence and aerospace deals a 25% increase from 2023 exhibition.

cards.big: LIMA 2025 generated RM18.5 billion in defence deals up 25%
cards.sub: Malaysia premier expo attracted 480 exhibitors from 42 countries

cards.big: Largest contract RM4.2 billion for 18 light combat aircraft from Korea Aerospace
cards.sub: Deal includes technology transfer and maintenance hub in Subang

cards.big: Naval orders totalled RM6.8 billion including 6 littoral mission ships
cards.sub: Ships built at Boustead with 60% local content requirement

cards.big: Only 35% of LIMA contracts had confirmed funding at time of signing
cards.sub: Past LIMA saw 40% of deals cancelled or reduced post-event

cards.big: LIMA orders test whether announced deals translate into actual delivered capability
RM18.5 billion in LIMA orders — defence procurement must balance capability needs against fiscal discipline.
